reference: THE DOUBLE FANS OF MINUTE WRINKLES BREAKING FROM EYE CORNER TO TEMPLE AND JOINING WITH THOSE OVER THE CHEEKBONES WERE DRAWN INTO THE HORIZONTAL LINES ACROSS THE DOMED FOREHEAD
text: the double fans and minute wrinkles breaking from eye-corner to temple and joining with those over the cheek-bones were drawn into the horizontal lines across the domed forehead
